welcome.title: Welcome To
welcome.subtitle: Advanced Skincare
welcome.description1: At Glow Studio Advanced Skincare, we are committed to delivering exceptional skincare solutions that enhance your natural beauty and boost your confidence. Our expert team specializes in a wide range of advanced treatments, including laser hair removal, laser skin care, micropeeling with DP4, chemical peels, and much more.
welcome.description2: Whether you're looking to refresh your skin, reduce imperfections, or enjoy long-term smoothness, we provide personalized care designed to meet your unique skin goals.

about.description: Every treatment is tailored to your skinâ€™s unique needs by our expert team, combining modern science with a gentle, holistic touch.

chemicalPeel.title: Chemical Peel
chemicalPeel.description: Exfoliate and renew your skin for a brighter, smoother texture.
chemicalPeel.heroSubtitle: Gently exfoliates, resurfaces skin, improves texture, tone, and clarity.
chemicalPeel.introDesc: This treatment gently exfoliates dead skin cells while stimulating collagen production to improve skin texture and tone. It helps reduce fine lines, pigmentation, acne scars, and unevenness, revealing a smoother, brighter complexion with lasting results.
chemicalPeel.bioRePeelDesc: BioRePeel is an advanced, non-invasive chemical peel designed to support skin regeneration with minimal downtime. It effectively addresses acne, uneven tone, fine lines, and dull texture through gentle exfoliation, collagen stimulation, and cellular renewal, often with little to no peeling. Its unique bi-phase technology revitalizes and brightens skin, promoting a smoother, youthful complexion. Safe for all skin types, BioRePeel delivers visible improvements instantly and over time. Schedule your appointment today and rediscover your skin's natural radiance.
chemicalPeel.info: Utilizes chemical solutions to remove the top layers of the skin, helping to improve the texture and appearance of the skin by reducing fine lines, wrinkles, and dark spots, and treating acne.
chemicalPeel.preCare1: Avoid sun exposure, tanning beds, and self-tanners for at least 2 weeks.
chemicalPeel.preCare2: Stop using retinoids, exfoliants (AHAs/BHAs), and strong skincare products 3-5 days before treatment.
chemicalPeel.preCare3: Inform your provider about any medications, medical conditions, or history of cold sores (antiviral may be required).
chemicalPeel.preCare4: Avoid waxing, plucking, or threading the treatment area for 4 weeks; shaving 24 hours before is allowed.
chemicalPeel.preCare5: Avoid blood-thinning medications (aspirin, ibuprofen, fish oil) 48 hours prior unless prescribed.
chemicalPeel.postCare1: Avoid direct sun exposure and always use SPF 50+ to protect healing skin.
chemicalPeel.postCare2: Expect redness, peeling, and flaking; do not pick or peel the skin.
chemicalPeel.postCare3: Use gentle cleansers and moisturizers; avoid retinoids and exfoliants for at least 7 days.
chemicalPeel.postCare4: Avoid hot showers, saunas, and intense exercise for 48 hours.
chemicalPeel.faq1_q: Are there different types of Peels?
chemicalPeel.faq1_a: Chemical peels range from light (gentle exfoliation), to medium (for scars and pigmentation), to deep (for severe wrinkles and damage).
chemicalPeel.faq2_q: Are there any risks or side effects?
chemicalPeel.faq2_a: Redness, irritation, sensitivity, rashes, scarring, and pigmentation are risks associated with treatment.
chemicalPeel.faq3_a: Chemical peels should be avoided by those with active skin infections, open wounds, or very sensitive skin. They're not recommended during pregnancy, for people with recent Accutane use, or those prone to keloids or poor healing. Always consult a professional before starting treatment.
chemicalPeel.faq4_q: How often should I get a Chemical Peel?
chemicalPeel.faq4_a: Light peels can be done every 4â€“6 weeks to maintain results, while medium peels are typically spaced 3â€“6 months apart. Deep peels are more intensive and usually done only once every few years. We will recommend the ideal schedule based on your skinâ€™s needs.
chemicalPeel.faq5_a: Chemical peel results are not permanent, as your skin continues to age and is affected by sun exposure, lifestyle, and other factors. However, they can provide long-lasting improvements in skin texture, tone, and clarity. Maintenance treatments and good skincare habits help prolong the results.
chemicalPeel.benefit4: Minimizes acne scars and other types of scarring
chemicalPeel.benefit5: Can be customized for different skin types

bodySculpting.description: This treatment effectively reduces localized fat in areas like the belly, thighs, and arms, while also helping to improve the appearance of cellulite. It's a painless, non-surgical procedure with no downtime, making it a convenient option for body contouring.

feature.description: Reveal your best skin with advanced, results-driven treatments tailored to your unique needs. From lasers to peels, each service is designed to boost glow, smooth texture, and enhance radiance.

workWonders.laserHairRemoval.title: Laser Hair Removal Benefits
workWonders.laserHairRemoval.description: Laser hair removal is a long-term solution for unwanted hair, offering convenience and lasting results. It reduces hair growth significantly, saves time, and minimizes skin irritation compared to traditional methods. This treatment offers smooth, flawless skin without the need for shaving or waxing ever again. It effectively eliminates ingrown hairs and is safe for all skin tones, including ethnic skin.
workWonders.bodySculpting.title: Body Sculpting Benefits
workWonders.bodySculpting.description: This treatment effectively reduces localized fat in areas like the belly, thighs, and arms, while also helping to improve the appearance of cellulite. It's a painless, non-surgical procedure with no downtime, making it a convenient option for body contouring.
workWonders.chemicalPeel.title: Chemical Peeling Benefits
workWonders.chemicalPeel.description: The formula targets multiple skin concerns with a blend of actives. TCA 35% improves texture, scars, and pigmentation, while salicylic acid clears pores and controls oil. Tartaric acid brightens, and lactobionic acid supports cell metabolism. Vitamin C offers antioxidant protection and strengthens capillaries, while amino acids and Vitamin B2 revitalize and promote healthy cell renewal.
workWonders.microneedling.title: Microneedling with DP4 (Dermapen 4) benefits
workWonders.microneedling.description: Microneedling with DP4 (Dermapen4) stimulates collagen production by creating tiny micro-injuries in the skin, helping reduce fine lines, scars, and uneven texture. It leaves the skin smoother, firmer, and naturally radiant with minimal downtime.

aboutUs.whatIsLuneDescription: At Glow Studio, we combine advanced technology with personalized care to treat and enhance your skin from within. Our expert-led treatments target concerns like aging, pigmentation, acne, and dullnessâ€”delivering visible results with comfort and confidence.
aboutUs.futureDescription: The founders of Glow Studio share a passion for skin health and innovation. With experience in dermatology, wellness, and aesthetics, they created science-backed, personalized treatments that deliver real results. Their goal is to help everyone feel confident in their skin through advanced, effective care.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.q1: What skin concerns do your treatments address?
faq.a1: Our treatments target a range of concerns including acne, pigmentation, fine lines, wrinkles, uneven texture, enlarged pores, and dullness.
faq.q2: Is there any downtime after treatments?
faq.a2: Downtime varies by treatment, but most aesthetic procedures have minimal to no downtime. You might experience mild redness, swelling, or sensitivity for a day or two. Some treatments, like deep chemical peels or micropeeling, may require a few days of recovery. Always follow post-care instructions for the best results.
faq.q3: How do I know which treatment is right for me?
faq.a3: We will assess your skin type, concerns, goals, and medical history to recommend the most suitable options. Personalized consultations ensure safe, effective results tailored to your needs.
faq.q4: Are your treatments suitable for all skin types?
faq.a4: Yes, many of our treatments are suitable for all skin types, including sensitive and deeper skin tones. However, certain procedures may need to be adjusted based on your skin's unique needs. Our consultation helps ensure the treatment is safe, effective, and tailored to your skin type.
faq.a5: Most of our treatments are not painful and are generally well-tolerated. You may feel mild discomfort like tingling, warmth, or a light prickling sensation, depending on the procedure. For more sensitive treatments, cooling pads or gels are applied to ensure comfort throughout the session.

consentForm.title: Client Consent Form
consentForm.description: Please review the following information carefully. Your safety and comfort are our top priorities.
consentForm.medicalQuestion: Do you currently have or have you had any of the following?
consentForm.consent1: I acknowledge that I have voluntarily requested a skin care treatment / laser service from Glow Studio Advanced Skincare. I understand that while complications are rare, they can occur. Potential risks include but are not limited to: temporary redness, swelling, blistering, burns, scarring, or changes in skin pigmentation.
consentForm.consent2: I confirm that I have disclosed all relevant medical history, including current medications and recent sun exposure. I understand the importance of following pre- and post-treatment instructions to minimize risks and achieve optimal results.
consentForm.consent3: I understand that results vary from person to person and that multiple sessions may be required. No guarantees have been made to me regarding the outcome of the treatment.
consentForm.consent4: By signing below, I release Glow Studio Advanced Skincare and its staff from any liability associated with the treatment performed, except in cases of gross negligence.
consentForm.agreement: I have read and understand the contents of this consent form.

bookingConsent.implants: Do you have any metal implants or pacemakers?
bookingConsent.term1: I acknowledge that the information provided is accurate and complete. I understand the potential risks and side effects associated with this treatment, including but not limited to redness, swelling, and temporary sensitivity.
bookingConsent.term2: I verify that I have adhered to all pre-treatment instructions, including avoiding sun exposure and discontinuing specific skincare products as advised.
bookingConsent.term3: I consent to the treatment and release Glow Studio Skin Care and its staff from liability associated with normal risks of this procedure.
bookingConsent.agreeText: I have read and agree to the terms and conditions and certify that my medical history is accurate.
